name: Bug Report
about: Report a confirmed defect with reproducible steps and diagnostic evidence
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

> **Notice:** Only open issues for confirmed bugs. For usage questions, refer to documentation first.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Laravel Version** | e.g. 11.x |
| **DBFlow Core Version** | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| **PHP Version** | e.g. 8.3.x |

## Steps to Reproduce

Provide a minimal, deterministic sequence of actions that triggers the defect.

1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behavior

Describe the correct outcome according to documented or intended behavior.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what occurs instead. Include observable symptoms, state transitions, or side effects.

## Relevant Logs / Error Messages

```
Paste stack traces, exception messages, or log excerpts here.
Redact secrets and environment-specific identifiers.
```

## Additional Context

Optional: related workflow definitions, configuration snippets, or links to failing test cases.
